title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Colliers India

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Colliers India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Colliers India in Noida offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Colliers India:
Colliers India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Colliers India!
